methodology.marketCaps: Market-cap changes are valuation changes, not capital inflows. CoinMarketCap supplies current aggregate and asset market caps.
methodology.stablecoins: USDT and USDC market caps proxy circulating supply in USD. Their sum is labelled as tracked major stablecoins, not the entire stablecoin market.
methodology.usdtPeg: USDT peg deviation is (price - 1 USD) × 10,000 basis points and is not a flow metric.
methodology.etf: SoSoValue v1 daily aggregate net flow is used for U.S. BTC, ETH, and SOL spot ETF series. Its one-month response is merged with prior observations; missing trading days are never filled with zero.
methodology.treasury: Corporate treasury holdings and acquisition-cost observations keep separate source dates. Strategy average cost uses its official Form 8-K; BitMine cost basis per ETH is derived only from same-date SEC units and cost basis. Press-release spot prices are never treated as acquisition cost.
methodology.blockbeats: BlockBeats is reserved as an auxiliary BTC cross-check only and never overwrites the primary ETF series.
